## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactoring / code quality

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have run the test suite (`npm test` and/or `npm run python:test`) and all tests pass
- [ ] For behavior changes: I have written/updated tests
- [ ] For Python migration changes: I have run the relevant comparator (`npm run python:compare` or equivalent) and outputs match
- [ ] I have not included secrets, API keys, or real credentials
- [ ] I have not staged generated files from `server/data/deepseekKeywordDictionary.*/` or `server/data/keywordCoverage*` unless the PR explicitly harvests data
- [ ] My changes follow the project's code style and architecture conventions
